reviews.review_description:
It would be much better if it had furthet draw distances, and even though there is an option for it in the Settings- it absolutely refuses to stay at where I set the bar at! EVERY single time I change it and exit out of that menu, it's reverted back to default and nothing changes.
He*l, my literal first attempt at playing this game had me failing because I couldn't control the car for whatever reason, so that was a great first imlression. The Music is also not working if this gane even has any (there's volune control for it in the Settings, so I assume there is supposed to be...).
So no control at all on my first run, literally no music at all, and the terrible draw distance thst mskes the game ilunplayable for me REFUSES to change no matter what I do with the setting!

So forgive me if I feel like this game is a complete waste of the few dollars it cost...
Loved this game on flat screen and even much more better on VR.....3 levels of view makes it even Greater..... thanks Devs❤️❤️❤️
